movie.actors: Clint Eastwood, Patricia Clarkson, Liam Neeson, Evan C. Kim
movie.plot: Dirty Harry Callahan must stop a sick secret contest to murder local celebrities, which includes himself as a target.
movie.title: The Dead Pool
movie.writer: Harry Julian Fink (characters), Rita M. Fink (characters), Steve Sharon (story), Durk Pearson (story), Sandy Shaw (story), Steve Sharon (screenplay)
